zh.lifeSummary: 當William Hudleston Esq.於1466年出生時，他的父親Sir John Hudleston47歲，母親Lady Mary Fenwyke37歲。他於大約1481年與Isabel Neville結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1509年在英國坎布利其爾薩福斯頓享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Hudleston Esq.于1466年出生时，他的父亲Sir John Hudleston47岁，母亲Lady Mary Fenwyke37岁。他于大约1481年与Isabel Neville结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1509年在英国坎布利其爾薩福斯頓享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hudleston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Huddleston
meanings: English: habitational name from Huddleston (Yorkshire), from an Old English personal name Hūdel (genitive Hūdeles; see Huddle ) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Hudleston Esq. was born in 1466, his father, Sir John Hudleston, was 47 and his mother, Lady Mary Fenwyke, was 37. He married Isabel Neville about 1481. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1509, in Sawston, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Hudleston Esq. est né en 1466, son père, Sir John Hudleston, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Fenwyke, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Neville environ 1481. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1509, à Sawston, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Hudleston Esq. 1466 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Hudleston 47 und seine Mutter Lady Mary Fenwyke 37. Er hat um 1481 Isabel Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1509 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Sawston, Cambridgeshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Hudleston Esq. è nato il nel 1466, il suo padre, Sir John Hudleston, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Lady Mary Fenwyke, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Neville circa 1481. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1509, nel Sawston, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Hudleston Esq.が1466年に生まれた時，父Sir John Hudlestonは47歳，母Lady Mary Fenwykeは37歳であった。約1481年にIsabel Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1509年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアサウストンで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Hudleston Esq.(이)가 1466년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Hudleston(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary Fenwyke(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1481년 Isabel Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1509년 영국 캄브리지실르 사w스턴에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Sawston, Cambridgeshire, England, United: Sawston, Caer Grawnt, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Hudleston Esq. nasceu em 1466, seu pai, Sir John Hudleston, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Fenwyke, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Neville aproximadamente 1481. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1509, em Sawston, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Hudleston Esq. родился в 1466 г., его отцу по имени Sir John Hudleston было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Fenwyke, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Neville около 1481 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1509 г. в местности савстон, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Hudleston Esq. nació en 1466, su papá, Sir John Hudleston, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Lady Mary Fenwyke, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Isabel Neville aproximadamente 1481. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1509, en Sawston, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años.
